response.justification: While the candidate meets the 15-year minimum experience requirement and has a solid entrepreneurial and software engineering background, they lack the deep, recognized AI/ML expertise and Director-level strategic advisory experience required for this Principal AI Strategy role. Their AI exposure appears limited to recent tooling rather than enterprise-level AI platform strategy and leadership.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience
Entrepreneurial background as an open-source founder
Demonstrated community engagement through workshops and talks
concerns: Lacks recognized expertise in AI/ML and AI product strategy
No evidence of Director-level strategic advisory experience
Background is heavily weighted toward general full-stack and web development
